title: Hierarchy of IT Capacity Requirements & Measurements
description: A flowchart showing how different kinds of requirements (business, user, system) are derived from each other and the specific metrics used to measure performance at each level.
elements: Measurements & Metrics (e.g., 'Transactions/sec, IOPS, RAM, Network Bandwidth')
relationships: User/Application Requirements translate to System/Infrastructure Requirements
System/Infrastructure Requirements are quantified by specific Measurements & Metrics
